name: Hunter - Tootega Nahi, Todega
overview: Hunter is an action thriller web series that follows Suniel Shetty as ACP Vikram in his journey to the dark alleys of Mumbai's crime world. A mission to find a missing woman leads him juggling between his past and future.

trailers.title: Hunter - Official Trailer 2023 | Suniel Shetty, Esha Deol, Rahul Dev, Karanvir S | Amazon miniTV
